title: Strolid Leadership Call
summary: The Strolid Leadership call focused on immediate execution, with participants committing to weekly deliverables to address lagging performance in the auto sector. Joe Furnari is prioritizing the BDS contract, while Vinnie Micciche raised concerns about Vonic expenses and suggested exploring a bridge loan. Marketing output was deemed insufficient, and a follow-up meeting was scheduled with Michael Donovan to address these concerns.

decisions.description: New meeting format focused on weekly deliverables and execution.
Joe Furnari will follow up and do whatever is needed to get the BDS contract signed this week.
Look into a bridge loan or line of credit due to high Vonic expenses.
Kevin Breen will build an engagement report this week, collaborating with Matt Watson.
Sales team will commit to a minimum of 30 cold calls weekly until sales increase.
Shawna Behen will hold expectation meetings with operations managers tomorrow.
Focus on low-hanging fruit to sign up clients, prioritizing those willing to write a check.

actionItems.task: Follow up on the BDS contract to get it signed.
Meet with Vin Micciche to discuss 'talk two stuff' and get an answer on the auditor contract.

expectedOutcome.description: Completed engagement report with internal visibility, dealer health, and agent performance.

actionItems.task: Push the VA rollout and resolve issues.

expectedOutcome.description: VA rollout ready to deploy with the first couple of dealers.

actionItems.task: Conduct a deep dive into the service and follow-up teams, especially the service side.

expectedOutcome.description: Assessment of staffing levels and process efficiency in service and follow-up teams.

actionItems.task: Hold expectation meetings with operations managers.

expectedOutcome.description: Documented expectations and agreements with operations managers.

actionItems.task: Get the auditor to sign the contract.
Continue to go through the engage program and make a minimum of 30 cold calls every week.

expectedOutcome.description: Increased leads and sales from cold calls.

actionItems.task: Generate more marketing activity and content.

expectedOutcome.description: Increased number of leads generated from marketing efforts.

tensions: Frustration that requested items are not continually getting done.
Concerns about the auto side being in a "tail spin" since September.
Concerns about high Vonic expenses and the need for cost control.
Dissatisfaction with the lack of marketing content and leads generated.
Concern that VA is holding up the rollout and Strolid is still paying them.
